scripts.dev:guide: uv --project services/devfest-guide-api --cache-dir services/devfest-guide-api/.uv-cache run --env-file .env uvicorn devfest_guide.web:app --app-dir services/devfest-guide-api --port 8000
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n web,guide -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run dev:guide"
scripts.test:guide: uv --project services/devfest-guide-api --cache-dir services/devfest-guide-api/.uv-cache run pytest -c services/devfest-guide-api/pyproject.toml
